---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: Suggest a feature or improvement / 建议新功能或改进
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem / 问题描述**
What problem does this feature solve? 这个功能解决什么问题？

**Proposed Solution / 建议方案**
Describe your proposed solution. 描述你的建议方案。

**Alternatives / 替代方案**
Any alternative solutions you've considered. 你考虑过的替代方案。

**Additional context / 补充信息**
Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
